Jumping
Red & Blue

A minimalist rhythm arcade game where every tap moves the next ball forward. Follow the path, stay on beat, and chase all 150 stars.

Screenshots Support Privacy Policy

Tap The Beat

Switch movement between the red and blue balls with crisp one-tap rhythm controls.

50 Levels

Clear handcrafted-feeling generated stages that steadily increase in speed and precision.

Stars & Progress

Earn star ratings, unlock level pages, and keep your progress saved locally.

Support

Need help with Jumping Red & Blue? Send a support request with your device model, iOS version, app version, and a short description of the issue.

Email: jumpingredblueballs.support@gmail.com

Typical response time: 2-5 business days.

Quick Help

  • If music is too loud, use the Music On/Off button on the main menu.
  • If progress is missing, make sure the app has not been deleted from the device.
  • If rewarded ads are unavailable, try again later. Ads depend on network availability.
  • If a level feels difficult, watch the direction marker and tap in rhythm with the beat.

Jumping Red & Blue is a single-player rhythm arcade game for iPhone and iPad. Support · Privacy Policy
